/usr/bin/g++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libggml.so.0 -o ../../../bin/libggml.so.0.9.10 "CMakeFiles/ggml.dir/ggml-backend-dl.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ggml.dir/ggml-backend-reg.cpp.o"  -Wl,-rpath,/home/radmann/EaSync/lib/ai/build/bin: -ldl ../../../bin/libggml-cpu.so.0.9.10 ../../../bin/libggml-base.so.0.9.10
